zh.lifeSummary: 當Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske於大約0990年出生在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾吉斯可時，他的父親Árne Arnmodssen of Giske33歲，母親Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige20歲。他和Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1050年在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾波根德享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske于大约0990年出生在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾吉斯可时，他的父亲Árne Arnmodssen of Giske33岁，母亲Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige20岁。他和Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1050年在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾波根德享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arnessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Aksel, Alf, Arndt, Egil, Niels, Ottar.
Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Arne, a short form of any of various Norse names of which arn ‘eagle’ is the first element (see Arne 1).

variants.name: Arneson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Alf, Arnt.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Arnesen or of the Swedish cognate Arnesson. This form of the surname is also found in Sweden, but it is rare there.
Possibly also an altered form of English Arnison (see Arnson ).

variants.name: Arne
meanings: English (northern), Swedish, and German: from the (medieval) personal name Arne, a short form of Arnold or, in Scandinavia, any of the many other Norse names of which arn ‘eagle’ is the first element, for example Arnbjörn, Arnfinn, and Arnsten.
English: habitational name from Arne, a place in Dorset, which is most probably named with Old English ærn ‘building, house’.

variants.name: Arnason
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Arni, Gudrun, Sig.  German Fritz, Hannes, Matthias.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Norwegian   Arnesen   (compare   Arneson  ).
Icelandic: patronymic from the personal name Árni, a cognate of Arne 1.

nameMeanings.name: Arnung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erland, Holger.  German Juergen, Klaus.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Arne  .

variants.name: Arne
meanings: English (northern), Swedish, and German: from the (medieval) personal name Arne, a short form of Arnold or, in Scandinavia, any of the many other Norse names of which arn ‘eagle’ is the first element, for example Arnbjörn, Arnfinn, and Arnsten.
English: habitational name from Arne, a place in Dorset, which is most probably named with Old English ærn ‘building, house’.

nameMeanings.name: Torberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + borg ‘fortification’.

variants.name: Thorborg
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + borg ‘fortification’.

variants.name: Torbjørg
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + borg ‘fortification’.

historicEvents.title: Christianity to Norway
historicEvents.description: "King Olav Tryggvason and King Olav Haraldsson ""The Holy"" brought Christianity to Norway."

en.lifeSummary: When Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske was born about 0990, in Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norway, his father, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, was 33 and his mother, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, was 20. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. He died in 1050, in Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Norway, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske est né environ 0990, à Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norvège, son père, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. Il est décédé en 1050, à Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Norvège, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske um 0990 in Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Árne Arnmodssen of Giske 33 und seine Mutter Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige 20. Er hatte mit Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1050 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Norwegen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske è nato il circa 0990 nel Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norvegia, il suo padre, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. Morì nel 1050, nel Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Norvegia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giskeが約0990年にノルウェームoア オグ ロムスダルギスクで生まれた時，父Árne Arnmodssen of Giskeは33歳，母Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaigeは20歳であった。彼はRagnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Soleとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1050年にノルウェームoア オグ ロムスダルボルグンドで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske(이)가 대략 0990년 노르웨이 o르 오그 롬즈다 지스크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Árne Arnmodssen of Giske(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1050년 노르웨이 o르 오그 롬즈다 볼건드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, seu pai, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. Ele faleceu em 1050, em Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske родился около 0990 г. в местности гиск, мoр ог ромсдаль, Норвегия, его отцу по имени Árne Arnmodssen of Giske было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, 20. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. Он умер в 1050 г. в местности боргунд, мoр ог ромсдаль, Норвегия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske nació aproximadamente 0990, en Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, su papá, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole. Murió en 1050, en Borgund, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, a la edad de 61 años.
